changelog: Fix: TUN routing false-positive CONNECTED — browser traffic was not routed through VPN
Fix: IPv6 now enters the tunnel (addRoute('::', 0))
Fix: Block CONNECTED until https://1.1.1.1/cdn-cgi/trace returns HTTP 200 via TUN
Fix: Show 'Server connected, but internet is not routed through VPN' on routing failure
New: Test routing button on Home screen — shows routed IP and response status
